description: Term-to-anchor mapping for WEO methodology cross-reference system. Maps UI-visible terms to section anchors in the self-hosted V1.4 Methodology Manual.

mappings.context: Tier classification — verified cross-bloc adoption by principal AI actors from at least two distinct ecosystems
